resume.headline: Customer Support & Delivery Professional
resume.summary: Motivated fresher with strong communication skills and basic computer knowledge. Looking for delivery or customer support roles in Jammu.

resume.headline: Security & Warehouse Operations Professional
resume.summary: Experienced security guard and warehouse executive with 2+ years in gate management, CCTV monitoring, inventory handling, and team coordination. Based in Jammu, open to full-time day shift roles.

experience.title: Security Guard
experience.description: Managed entry/exit gates, visitor logs, and night patrolling for a 3-floor commercial complex.

experience.title: Warehouse Helper
experience.description: Assisted in picking, packing, and sorting goods. Maintained stock registers and loading dock safety.

seekerProfile.bio: Dedicated security and warehouse professional based in Jammu. Open to full-time roles with growth opportunities.

jobs.desc: Ex-servicemen preferred. Supervise guard deployment across 3 sites, manage rosters and conduct surprise checks. Two-wheeler mandatory.

jobs.desc: Front-desk receptionist for hospital OPD. Patient registration, appointment scheduling and billing coordination. Pleasant communication skills required.

jobs.title: Bike Rider
jobs.desc: Food delivery riders needed. Work on your own schedule. Weekly payouts, surge bonuses on weekends, free insurance coverage while on duty.

jobs.title: Data Entry Operator
jobs.desc: Data entry operators required with typing speed of 30+ WPM. Computer with basic MS Office knowledge required. Work from office, fixed day shift.

jobs.title: Plumber
jobs.desc: Experienced plumbers required for society maintenance work. Part-time or full-time options available. Per-visit payment plus monthly retainer.

jobs.title: Sales Executive
jobs.desc: In-store sales executive for electronics. Convert walk-in customers, achieve monthly targets, earn incentives up to ₹8,000/month over salary.

jobs.title: Electrician
jobs.desc: ITI certified electricians needed for home services. Earn per job basis up to ₹40,000/month. Flexible working hours, free training and toolkit support.

jobs.title: Housekeeping Staff
jobs.desc: 5-star hotel hiring housekeeping staff for room cleaning and laundry services. Food and uniform provided. Tips and service charge benefits.

jobs.title: Customer Support
jobs.desc: Voice & chat process for domestic customers. Good Hindi communication required. 5-day work week, cab facility for night shifts, attractive incentives.

jobs.title: Warehouse Executive
jobs.desc: Amazon fulfillment center hiring warehouse executives for picking, packing and sorting operations. Free transport, meals, medical insurance and performance incentives.

jobs.desc: Apollo Hospitals Jammu is hiring GNM/B.Sc qualified staff nurses for ICU and general wards. Attractive salary, accommodation assistance and yearly increments.

jobs.title: Office Assistant
jobs.desc: Looking for an office assistant to handle billing support, file management, customer coordination and inventory entries. Basic computer knowledge (MS Excel) required.

jobs.title: Delivery Partner
jobs.desc: Join Blinkit as a delivery partner. Deliver groceries within 10 minutes in your locality. Own bike & smartphone required. Weekly payouts, fuel allowance, and joining bonus of ₹2,000.

jobs.title: Security Guard
jobs.desc: We are hiring trained security guards for commercial complexes in Jammu. Responsibilities include gate management, visitor logging, CCTV monitoring and patrolling. Uniform and training provided. ESI/PF benefits included.

questions.text: Feedback to a teammate should be:
When explaining a process to a new joiner, you should:
options: Speak slowly with simple steps and check understanding
Give them a manual and leave

questions.text: A visitor arrives without an appointment. What is the most professional first response?
options: Greet politely and ask how you can help
Tell them to come back tomorrow

questions.text: How should you confirm you understood a customer's request?
options: Repeat the key points back clearly

questions.text: In a team meeting, the best way to share an idea is:
options: Wait for your turn and speak clearly with examples

questions.text: A customer is upset about a delay. First step?
options: Listen calmly and acknowledge their concern

questions.text: Professional greeting when answering office phone:
options: Good morning, [Company name], how may I help you?

questions.text: Non-verbal communication includes:
options: Body language, eye contact, and gestures

questions.text: When giving instructions over phone with poor network:
options: Speak clearly, confirm each step, and offer to repeat

questions.text: A colleague speaks loudly on a call disturbing others. Best approach?
options: Politely ask them to lower their voice
